title: Fake judgments, AI ‘hallucinations’: Supreme Court asks Bar Council of India to probe risks of artificial intelligence

content:

content:

title: From Chips to Champions: How AI propelled Samsung to $1 trillion club
description: Samsung Electronics has crossed the $1 trillion market capitalisation mark, placing it among a select group of global technology giants. This milestone reflects a significant shift in investor perception and underscores the growing importance of semiconductor leadership in the global economy. The rally has been largely fuelled by strong momentum in artificial intelligence-driven demand. (Source: CNBC, Bloomberg, Reuters, Simply Wall St) The Big Milestone

title: Zalando posts higher quarterly growth, as AI efficiency boosts operations
description: European online ​fashion retailer Zalando on Wednesday reported quarterly growth above last ‌year's level, benefiting from artificial intelligence investments that are making its business more efficient.
content:
The company said its gross merchandise volume (GMV), a key revenue metric measuring ​the value of all goods sold, rose 21.7% to ​4.3 billion euros ($5.03 billion) in the first quarter, compared to ⁠3.5 billion euros a year earlier.
